hotels.name: Visão do Céu
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Viçosa do Ceará et offrant une vue sur la ville, l’établissement Visão do Céu possède une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et un parking privé gratuit.

Vous bénéficierez d’une salle de bains privative entièrement équipée avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits.

L’établissement Visão do Céu comprend une terrasse et un barbecue.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport régional Comandante Ariston Pessoa) est à 132 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Visão do Céu in Viçosa do Ceará offers a homestay experience with a sun terrace and free WiFi. Guests can relax in the outdoor seating area or enjoy the balcony with city views.
Modern Amenities: The property features a shared kitchen, private bathrooms with free toiletries, and a minibar. Additional amenities include a hairdryer and TV, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Convenient Facilities: Private check-in and check-out services, free on-site parking, and barbecue facilities enhance the guest experience. The reception staff speak Portuguese, providing assistance as needed.
Accessible Location: Ariston Pessoa Regional Airport is 132 km away, offering convenient travel options.
hotels.description_es:
Visão do Céu está en Viçosa do Ceará y tiene vistas a la ciudad, wifi gratis y parking privado gratis.

Todas las unidades tienen baño privado totalmente equipado con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos.

La habitación en casa particular dispone de terraza y barbacoa.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional Ariston Pessoa) está a 132 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

hotels.name: Sítio Relax
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Tianguá, l’hébergement Sítio Relax offre une vue sur le jardin. Il propose une piscine extérieure, une terrasse et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Cette maison de vacances comprend une piscine privée, un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.

Cette maison de vacances comporte 1 chambre séparée, ainsi qu’une cuisine avec un minibar, une plaque de cuisson et un coin repas.

Un service de location de voitures est disponible sur place.

hotels.description_en:
Spacious Holiday Home in Tianguá: Sítio Relax offers a spacious holiday home in Tianguá, Brazil. The property features a garden, terrace, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Comfortable Living Spaces: The holiday home includes one bedroom and three bathrooms. Family rooms provide ample space for relaxation. A balcony offers garden views, while the terrace is ideal for outdoor dining.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy a fully equipped kitchen with a stovetop, washing machine, and dishwasher. The property includes a minibar, barbecue, and dining area. Free on-site private parking is provided.
Convenient Location: São Benedito Airport is 41 km away. Car hire services are available for exploring the surrounding area.

La casa o chalet cuenta con 1 dormitorio independiente e incluye cocina con minibar, fogones y zona de comedor.

La casa o chalet ofrece servicio de alquiler de coches.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de São Benedito) está a 41 km.

Cette maison de vacances se compose de 1 chambre, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un réfrigérateur et une bouilloire, ainsi que de 1 salle de bains avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont à disposition.

Comfortable Living Spaces: The holiday home features one bedroom, a bathroom, and a comfortable living room. Amenities include a balcony with garden and mountain views, a fully equipped kitchen, and a dining area.
Outdoor Leisure: An outdoor fireplace, picnic area, and kids' club provide ample opportunities for relaxation and entertainment. Bicycle parking and free on-site private parking enhance the stay.
Nearby Attractions: Pai Inacio Mountain is 48 km away, and Lençóis Airport is 70 km from the property. Reception staff speak English, Spanish, and Portuguese.

Esta casa o chalet consta de 1 dormitorio, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y hervidor, y 1 baño con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en la casa o chalet.

hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a Palmeiras, a 48 km da Pai Inacio Mountain, Hospedaria Lunar mette a disposizione una terrazza e parcheggio privato gratuito. Questo affittacamere presenta camere familiari.

Presso questo affittacamere, le camere comprendono un balcone. Tutte le unità presentano il bagno privato, l'asciugacapelli e le lenzuola.

Hospedaria Lunar offre una colazione americana.

Aeroporto Coronel Horácio de Mattos si trova a 70 km di distanza.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap
